title: Repeated backchannels while the agent explains (should NOT yield)

transcript.agent: So once the deposit clears we release the hold, and after that the funds are available the same business day, and you can move them wherever you like.

why_it_matters: The caller drops four short acknowledgements across the agent's explanation. Every one is listener feedback, not a bid for the floor. A correct agent holds through all of them and finishes its thought. An agent that treats each backchannel as an interruption becomes impossible to talk to. The reference here holds: did_yield stays false and the event passes.
